APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Ariel Gershon, Esq. (415-773-1240; ariel@greensteinmcdonald.com) of Greenstein & McDonald for Plaintiff.
Audrey Tam, Esq. (415-433-0990; audrey.tam@wilsonelser.com) of Wilson, Elser, Moskowitz, Edelman & Dicker, LLP for Defendants.

The Court noted courtesy copies were not properly received and asked if all parties are available for continuance of matter to July 13, 2021 at 9am. All parties agreed with the new date, the court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SF MULTIFAMILY 1 LLC's Motion To Quash, Or In The Alternative Limit, The Subpoena To Ballast Investments:

is continued to July 13, 2021 at 9am. JPT stipulations will be addressed on July 13, 2021. Parties to submit courtesy copies with bookmarks in Acrobat directly to rosenq@mac.com by July 6, 2021.

Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
